---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help improve snipl
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what happened.

**To reproduce**

```
# Include the exact command(s) you ran
snipl ...
```

**Expected behavior**
What should have happened.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened (include error output, exit codes).

**Environment**

- OS: [e.g. Linux, macOS, Windows]
- Node version: `node --version`
- snipl version: `snipl --version`
- Project layout: [e.g. Vite, Next.js, plain Node, monorepo]

**Safety concern?**
Did this bug cause or risk:

- [ ] Data loss / overwrite
- [ ] File written outside project root
- [ ] Integrity bypass (hash mismatch not detected)
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Any other relevant information.
